title: OptiLame
description: PvP-focused modpack with QoF and Lite features for optimized gameplay.
body: my modpack is specifically tailored for PvP gameplay, focusing on QoF and Lite features. It enhances the competitive experience by optimizing performance, reducing lag, and improving gameplay mechanics for a smoother and more enjoyable PvP environment. Ideal for players who want a streamlined, fast-paced, and efficient PvP setup without unnecessary bloat. if you dont want any thing in the modpack get rid of it
